whyItMatters: Every claim, encounter, and configuration record is scoped to an organization. Without an organization row, no submissions can be built.
resolution: Create the organization record on the Organization settings page.

whyItMatters: Inactive organizations cannot submit claims or process enrollments.
resolution: Re-activate the organization on the Organization settings page or restore it from the archive.

message: Organization is missing a display name.
whyItMatters: The organization name appears on claims, statements, and the application header. A missing name breaks claim formatting and confuses staff.
resolution: Set the organization name on the Organization settings page.

message: Organization is missing a legal name.
whyItMatters: The legal name is used on payer enrollments and 1099s. Mismatches between the display name and the legal name can cause enrollment rejections.
resolution: Enter the legal entity name on the Organization settings page.

message: Organization is missing the last 4 of its Tax ID.
whyItMatters: The Tax ID last-4 is used to disambiguate billing entities and to safely confirm the billing profile in audits.
resolution: Enter the last 4 digits of the EIN on the Organization settings page.

whyItMatters: Without an organization timezone, appointment and claim dates may be computed in UTC and appear off-by-one to staff.
resolution: Pick the organization's primary timezone on the Organization settings page.
